name: FVG Scalper (Ramzi Saoud)
author: @ramzi_saoud

reported_stats.note: Cherry-picked examples in reel — must validate with backtest

indicators.FVG Detection: 3-candle imbalance — gap between candle 1 high and candle 3 low
indicators.HTF Bias: D1/W1 EMA 20 — only trade in direction of higher timeframe
indicators.Liquidity Sweep: Price takes out swing highs/lows then reverses
indicators.Market Structure Shift: Break of recent swing high (bullish) or low (bearish)

long: Liquidity sweep of lows on M15/M30
Bullish Market Structure Shift (break above recent lower high)
Bullish FVG forms after the MSS
Price returns to mitigate the FVG (enters the gap zone)
Rejection candle or strong close above FVG low
Enter on close of confirmation candle
short: Liquidity sweep of highs on M15/M30
Bearish Market Structure Shift (break below recent higher low)
Bearish FVG forms after the MSS
Price returns to mitigate the FVG (enters the gap zone)
Rejection candle or strong close below FVG high
Enter on close of confirmation candle

exit_rules.stop_loss: Just beyond opposite side of FVG + 0.3% buffer (8-15 pips on M15)
exit_rules.tp2: Next liquidity pool or opposite FVG
exit_rules.tp3_runner: Trail stop using previous swing or 1:3+ RR

risk_rules: FVG must be fresh (< 4-6 hours / 24 bars old)
Only trade during London open + NY overlap
Avoid Asian session and news events
confluences_required: HTF POI alignment (order block, breaker, or FVG on D1)

_recommendations: BTC 15M: Very few trades — try longer timeframe or wider date range for more data
BTC 15M: Profit factor below 1 — strategy loses money. Review exit logic
